name: turbolite
description: turbolite -- SQLite with compressed page groups and optional S3 cloud storage. Returns standard better-sqlite3 connections.

scripts.build-ext: cd ../.. && CARGO_TARGET_DIR=$(pwd)/target cargo build --release --no-default-features --features 'loadable-extension,cli-s3,https,zstd' --lib && cp target/release/libturbolite_ffi.dylib packages/node/turbolite.dylib 2>/dev/null; cp target/release/libturbolite_ffi.so packages/node/turbolite.so 2>/dev/null; true
